# o2-scalpel-elixir

Scalpel refactor MCP server for Elixir via elixir-ls

## Install

```bash
claude plugin install o2-scalpel-elixir --from o2-scalpel
```

## Requirements

- Claude Code >= 1.0.0
- LSP server: `elixir-ls` on `$PATH`
- File extensions handled: .ex, .exs

## Facades

| Facade | Summary |
|---|---|
| `scalpel_rename` | Rename a symbol across the workspace |
| `scalpel_extract` | Extract selection into a function or variable |
| `scalpel_fix_lints` | Apply credo + dialyzer diagnostic quick-fixes |

## Skills

This plugin ships skills under `skills/` so Claude knows when to call each facade.
